required_before_custom_domain: operator selects and records the intended domain in a later governed task
domain ownership is verified in the hosting provider outside this repo
DNS changes are reviewed outside this repo
static artifact validation passes for site/dist
root-relative internal link checks pass for /eureka/ and / portability
no backend, live probe, production, or deployment-success claim is introduced
rollback and domain removal steps are recorded
takeover_risk_note: A custom domain must not be pointed at a static host until ownership verification and host binding are complete. Dangling DNS or removed host bindings can create domain takeover risk.

base_path_transition.notes: GitHub Pages project hosting uses /eureka/. A future custom domain or alternate static host may serve the same artifact at /. Static artifacts must keep internal links relative so both base paths remain valid.

canonical_url_policy.reason: Absolute public URLs can freeze host choice before a domain is configured. Static pages should prefer relative links until a future domain task updates this policy.

notes: This plan prepares host portability only.
No real domain is configured by this plan.
No DNS records are added by this plan.
No site/dist/CNAME file is committed by this plan.
No alternate static host project or provider config is added by this plan.
The current GitHub Pages project target remains static-only and deployment-success-unverified.
